_meta.purpose: CK product/variant -> Gelato productUid mapping for the full-site migration.
_meta.status: scaffold v1. Canvas is fully mapped (confirmed UIDs). Apparel/mug/card variant codes still need confirming against the live Gelato catalog API (product:search per catalog) before go-live.

uid_notes.canvas: canvas_{SIZE-TOKEN}_canvas_wood-fsc-{slim|thick}_4-0_{hor|ver}. CK uses slim (38mm) as default. Orientation chosen from artwork aspect (portrait=ver, landscape=hor, square=either).
uid_notes.apparel: apparel_product_gca_{garment}_gsc_{subcat}_gcu_{cut}_gqa_{quality}_gsi_{SIZE}_gco_{COLOUR}_gpr_{print}[_{brandsku}]. Garment colour+size+brand all encode into the UID -> must be pulled from catalog:search, do NOT hand-guess.
uid_notes.card: pack_of_cards_with_envelopes / pack_of_folded_cards_with_envelopes etc. Gelato cards are PACK-based; CK must decide singles vs packs (see migration spec).
uid_notes.mug: mug productUid from Mugs & Bottle catalog:search (e.g. White 11oz Ceramic Mug).

minResolutionPx.note: ~150dpi floor; current R2 masters are 1254px -> only safe to ~8in until upscaled (see migration spec blocker).

ck_products._note: Existing CK catalog (currently fulfilled by Printful via catalogProductId). Each needs a Gelato catalog + confirmed productUid template. status=todo means pull exact variant UIDs from Gelato catalog:search.

size_map_apparel._note: CK sizes -> Gelato GarmentSize tokens. Confirm the exact garment (brand/quality) supports each size via catalog:search.

colour_map_apparel._note: CK colour label -> Gelato GarmentColor token. Populate from catalog:search GarmentColor hits (e.g. black, white, navy, ash, red, forest, maroon, military-green, heather-dust, mauve, athletic-heather, dark-grey-heather). Names must match Gelato's tokens exactly.

launchProductsConfirmed._note: Exact Gelato productUids validated against the live API (200/activated). {SIZE} lowercase per size_map_apparel; {COLOUR} per colour_map_apparel. Front DTG print = gpr_4-0. Inside label adds a separate print position when enabled.

sweatshirt.verifyRegions: produces locally (same family as hoodie/tee, both quote-verified)

canvas.regions: all (prints locally per region, verified by quote)

greetingCard.blank: Folded/flat card pack — region-split catalogs cards-us / cards-eu
greetingCard.status: decide singles vs packs; pull exact pack UID per region

hats.status: IN (owner confirmed embroidery-safe designs are easy to produce)
hats.artwork: needs embroidery-safe art (mono CK badge or simplified high-contrast silhouettes), NOT the detailed full-colour designs
hats.todo: pick one blank per style (beechfield/yupoong), onesize; map gco colour set

apron.print: EMBROIDERY (chstc-emb) — badge only, not detailed art

dumpFindings.apparelUmbrella: catalog 'apparel' lists ALL: categories t-shirt/hoodie/sweatshirt/polo/onesie/hat/home-and-living/tank(subcat tank-top); brands incl bella-and-canvas, gildan, sols, etc.

flatPrintFamily.note: posters / fine-art / cards / photo-prints share a flat-product UID: {model}_pf_{format}_pt_{paperType}_cl_4-0_{hor|ver}. Format uses UnifiedPaperFormat tokens (e.g. 11x14-inch-270x350-mm, 16x20-inch-400x500-mm, A2). Choose a paper per product.
flatPrintFamily.todo: confirm exact model prefix for posters vs fine-art via one product lookup, then build size list from UnifiedPaperFormat tokens

apparelAvailabilityFlag: RESOLVED for the tee: order quotes confirm the Bella+Canvas 3001 produces LOCALLY in GB (£8.77, made GB), US ($10.69, made US) and AU (A$20.01, made AU). The product-detail supportedCountries/notSupportedCountries field is unreliable during Gelato's apparel-v2 migration — trust QUOTES (production/fulfilment country), not that field. Still to spot-check: hoodie + CA/NZ for apparel.
